title: Aranearum Fame
description: A Spider Horror modpack for you arachnaphobes out there.
body:
This modpack contains everything you need and more for a genuine terrifying experience - Ambience? Check. Progression? _Check._ Tons of massive spiders? **_CHECK._**

![Spider](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/89bfc191ae4da664d7f85dcd5675c771a4e41394_0.webp)

Core mods include:
- Nyf's spiders - Allows for spiders to rotate according to the surface they are on, even the ceiling!
- ARPHEX - Adds 10s of new creepy-crawlies to your game, including a boss spider, and many sets of armour and weapons to fight off the masses.
- Spiders sensing you - Spiders now sense the player wherever they go, following them from up to 500 blocks away.
- Spider infection - Spiders attack all mobs, turning them into spiders on death.

Recommended Shaderpacks:
- [Bliss BSPT](https://github.com/WATERFORCE99/Bliss-Shader-BSPT)
- [Spooklementary](https://modrinth.com/shader/spooklementary)
- [Hysteria](https://modrinth.com/shader/hysteria-shaders)

Recommended Resource Pack: [Patrix 32x](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/patrix-32x). Features all new detailed mob animations and a extremely detailed spider model.

For all shaders mentioned, please enable all LabPBR sections for the best experience with Patrix.

Please join the Discord server if you have suggestions on mods to add or potential bugs. _Enjoy!_

![Spider](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/772eec6d655b2bb8e3a2cb5398aa608c8d6980e5_0.webp)
